description: Make A Viz is an AI-powered diagramming tool that turns natural-language descriptions into editable flowcharts and other visual diagrams. It provides a web editor and a ChatGPT-integrated MCP experience for generating and editing diagrams.
summary: Make A Viz exposes a public MCP server at https://mcp.makeaviz.com/mcp that requires OAuth; no separate public HTTP, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found.
